name: Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the dried figs, dates, prunes, crushed pineapple, dark raisins, chopped apple, and walnuts.
2. Add orange juice to the fruit mixture and stir until well combined.
3. In another bowl, whisk together whole wheat flour, toasted wheat germ, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the fruit mixture, stirring until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
5. Pour the batter into a lightly oiled 10-inch tube pan, greasing the bottom and sides of the pan with butter or non-stick cooking spray.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 40 to 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for about 10 minutes before removing it and transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
